requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (NM/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; Montreal/Kigali via Mozambique NOU)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（NM/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；经莫桑比克臭氧机构执行的蒙特利尔/基加利）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（NM/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；經莫三比克臭氧機構執行的蒙特利爾/基加利）

summary.en: Mozambique does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regime. Refrigerant controls flow from Mozambique's obligations under the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment (HFC phase-down), implemented domestically through the National Ozone Unit (NOU) and the Ministry responsible for the environment, primarily as import licensing / quota controls on controlled substances rather than appliance-level product bans. At the appliance level, the dominant household-refrigerator refrigerant R-600a (isobutane, GWP approx. 3) is a hydrocarbon, not a controlled HFC, and is well-aligned with this framework. Safety of the flammable-refrigerant charge is governed by the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA requirements (maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, ignition-source requirements). Manufacturers should: (1) verify the R-600a charge complies with IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits; (2) document refrigerant type (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams in the product documentation; (3) for any HFC-based models (e.g. R-134a), confirm import-licensing status of the refrigerant under Mozambique's Montreal/Kigali implementation before shipment.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克没有欧盟式氟气体削减制度。制冷剂管控源于莫桑比克在《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》（HFC削减）下的义务，由国家臭氧机构（NOU）和负责环境的部委在国内执行，主要表现为对受控物质的进口许可/配额管控，而非器具层面的产品禁令。在器具层面，家用电冰箱主流制冷剂R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3）为碳氢化合物，非受控HFC，与该框架高度契合。可燃制冷剂充注量的安全性由所采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求管控（每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风、点火源要求）。制造商应：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在产品文件中记录制冷剂类型（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）对任何含HFC型号（如R-134a），在出货前确认该制冷剂在莫桑比克蒙特利尔/基加利执行框架下的进口许可状态。
summary.zht: 莫三比克沒有歐盟式氟氣體削減制度。製冷劑管控源於莫三比克在《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》（HFC削減）下的義務，由國家臭氧機構（NOU）和負責環境的部委在國內執行，主要表現為對受控物質的進口許可/配額管控，而非器具層面的產品禁令。在器具層面，家用電冰箱主流製冷劑R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3）為碳氫化合物，非受控HFC，與該框架高度契合。可燃製冷劑充注量的安全性由所採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求管控（每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風、點火源要求）。製造商應：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在產品文件中記錄製冷劑類型（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）對任何含HFC型號（如R-134a），在出貨前確認該製冷劑在莫三比克蒙特利爾/基加利執行框架下的進口許可狀態。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA — Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source requirements) — adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ

Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down obligations implemented in Mozambique via the National Ozone Unit (NOU) under the Ministry responsible for the environment (import licensing / quota controls on controlled substances)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

summary.en: China regulates flammable-refrigerant safety at the appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation). China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE), via its own import/production quota schedule. Because both China and Mozambique sit under the same Montreal/Kigali framework and both build appliance safety on IEC 60335-2-24, a Chinese exporter shipping R-600a household refrigerators is generally well-positioned on the refrigerant dimension; the residual work is charge documentation and, for any HFC models, refrigerant import-licensing in the destination country.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014管控可燃制冷剂安全，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）通过自有的进口/生产配额计划管理。由于中国和莫桑比克同处《蒙特利尔/基加利》框架，且均以IEC 60335-2-24为器具安全基础，出口R-600a家用电冰箱的中国出口商在制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件；剩余工作为充注量文件，以及对任何HFC型号在目的国的制冷剂进口许可。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面透過GB 4706.13-2014管控可燃製冷劑安全，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）透過自有的進口/生產配額計畫管理。由於中國和莫三比克同處《蒙特利爾/基加利》框架，且均以IEC 60335-2-24為器具安全基礎，出口R-600a家用電冰箱的中國出口商在製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件；剩餘工作為充注量文件，以及對任何HFC型號在目的國的製冷劑進口許可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and licensing rather than technology: (1) Charge documentation — product documentation must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and safety precautions per the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; Chinese CCC test reports may not be framed to evidence Annex AA charge-limit compliance for the destination. (2) HFC models — if any export model uses R-134a or another HFC, the refrigerant itself is a controlled substance under Mozambique's Montreal/Kigali implementation; import may require a licence/quota allocation handled through the in-country importer and the NOU. Mozambique does not impose an EU-style appliance-level HFC product ban, so HFC refrigerators are not prohibited per se, but the controlled refrigerant must clear import licensing. (3) Verification — the precise Mozambique import-licensing procedure for controlled refrigerants and the adopted edition of NM/IEC 60335-2-24 should be confirmed with INNOQ and the NOU before shipment.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和许可而非技术：（1）充注量文件——产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据所采纳IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事项；中国CCC检测报告可能未针对目的地证明符合附件AA充注量限值。（2）HFC型号——若任何出口型号使用R-134a或其他HFC，该制冷剂本身在莫桑比克蒙特利尔/基加利执行框架下属受控物质；进口可能须通过在地进口商和NOU取得许可/配额。莫桑比克未施加欧盟式器具层面HFC产品禁令，故含HFC冰箱本身不被禁止，但受控制冷剂须通过进口许可。（3）核实——莫桑比克受控制冷剂的具体进口许可程序及所采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24版本，应在出货前向INNOQ和NOU确认。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和許可而非技術：（1）充注量文件——產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據所採納IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事項；中國CCC檢測報告可能未針對目的地證明符合附件AA充注量限值。（2）HFC型號——若任何出口型號使用R-134a或其他HFC，該製冷劑本身在莫三比克蒙特利爾/基加利執行框架下屬受控物質；進口可能須透過在地進口商和NOU取得許可/配額。莫三比克未施加歐盟式器具層面HFC產品禁令，故含HFC冰箱本身不被禁止，但受控製冷劑須通過進口許可。（3）核實——莫三比克受控製冷劑的具體進口許可程序及所採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24版本，應在出貨前向INNOQ和NOU確認。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style F-Gas appliance ban. IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammable-refrigerant charge limits apply via the adopted NM/IEC safety standard. Controlled refrigerants (HFCs) subject to import licensing/quota under Mozambique's Montreal/Kigali implementation (NOU). R-600a (hydrocarbon) is not a controlled substance.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits). China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE via import/production quotas.

source.publisher: UNEP Ozone Secretariat (Mozambique country profile) / INNOQ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in household refrigerators and, as a hydrocarbon, is not a controlled substance under Mozambique's Montreal/Kigali framework, so R-600a units are well-positioned. Verify R-600a charge against the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits and document refrigerant type and charge weight in Portuguese. Mozambique has no EU-style appliance-level HFC ban, but any HFC refrigerant is subject to import licensing via the NOU — confirm with INNOQ and the NOU before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，作为碳氢化合物，在莫桑比克蒙特利尔/基加利框架下非受控物质，故R-600a器具条件良好。须核实R-600a充注量是否符合所采纳IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，并以葡萄牙语记录制冷剂类型及充注量。莫桑比克无欧盟式器具层面HFC禁令，但任何HFC制冷剂须经NOU进口许可——出货前请向INNOQ和NOU确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，作為碳氫化合物，在莫三比克蒙特利爾/基加利框架下非受控物質，故R-600a器具條件良好。須核實R-600a充注量是否符合所採納IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，並以葡萄牙語記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。莫三比克無歐盟式器具層面HFC禁令，但任何HFC製冷劑須經NOU進口許可——出貨前請向INNOQ和NOU確認。
